title: rhododendron × pavonium
intro: Rhododendron × pavonium, also known as the cross between Rhododendron and Ledum, is a type of flowering plant in the heath family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Rhododendron × pavonium include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Rhododendron × pavonium can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
